name: West Vault Mining Inc.
description: West Vault Mining Inc. is a Canadian-based mineral exploration and development company focused on the acquisition and advancement of high-quality gold projects in the United States. The company is primarily dedicated to its flagship Hasbrouck Gold Project located in Nevada, a jurisdiction known for its stable mining environment and productive mineral belts. By prioritizing construction-ready assets with low initial capital requirements, West Vault Mining aims to deliver significant value to its shareholders through disciplined leadership and a strategic approach to developing proven gold resources in a sustained gold market.
